source.derivation: Artifact reference NAMES only, taken from the banked M8.15 design-stroke card packet (the 4 graded-PASS strokes). NO geometry (stroke_points/segments), NO image binaries, and NO file paths are included — only the engine's canonical artifact filenames. The PNGs themselves are gitignored ~0.2-1.1 MB regenerables under the engine's data/outputs and are NOT served in this slice.
source.follow_up: A later slice should GENERATE this manifest via a v2 export runner (cf. reviewer_bundle.v1.json from Slice 1) instead of hand-deriving it, and only then decide an artifact URL/serving strategy.
